case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. SHANECE DOUGLAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $323.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100042457) AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANECE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042457) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044672) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANECE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANECE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-2019
DECLARATION OF WILLIAM COOPER IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585(B) (TRANSACTION ID # 100042457) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF MAR-07-2019 SET ASIDE
DECLARATION OF BRET A. YAPLE RE: ATTORNEY FEE SCHEDULE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042457) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
DECLARATION OF BRET A. YAPLE RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100042457) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100060685), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED JAN-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANECE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANECE $3,245.05 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,245.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, SHANECE $1,998.45 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $473.15 INTEREST, $323.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,245.05, SEE SCANNED DOC

DECLARATION OF BRET A YAPLE IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100043601) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
